title: Dev's Battery Pack
description: A resource pack that replaces the food / hunger icons with batteries!
body:
🔋 **Dev's Battery Pack** – **Minecraft Resource Pack**

Tired of the same old meat sticks cluttering your HUD? Power up your Minecraft experience with Dev's Battery Pack resource pack!

- 🎨 _Replaces the food / hunger icons with batteries!_
- ⚡ _Great for my fellow powered people._
- 🔧 _Compatible with appleskin!_
